title: Synthetic notification API brief
summary: A public-safe synthetic brief for a team notification API.

title: Team Notification API
summary: A small synthetic API package for sending team notifications.

title: Notify after event
summary: The system must send a notification after an approved event is recorded.

title: Webhook delivery
summary: Deliver notifications to a configured webhook endpoint.

title: Retry policy
summary: Retry failed webhook deliveries with a bounded retry policy.

title: Delivery worker
summary: Background worker responsible for webhook delivery attempts.

title: No secret logging
summary: Webhook credentials and request secrets must not be logged.

title: Duplicate delivery
summary: Retries may deliver the same notification more than once.

title: Credential leak
summary: Webhook credentials may leak through logs or error messages.

title: Idempotency key required
summary: Delivery requests should include an idempotency key to reduce duplicate side effects.

title: Implement retry policy
summary: Implement bounded retries in the delivery worker.
